trigger_condition: Logged macros exceed reference targets same day
guard_snippet: Define cap at 100% display or overflow label for over-target
potential_consequence: Bars break or imply error when over 100%

trigger_condition: Top two gaps same macro family
guard_snippet: Dedupe gap slots before recipe pick
potential_consequence: Duplicate meal idea rows for one nutrient

guard_snippet: Validation: require >=1 non-other group or explicit exception path
potential_consequence: Zero macro estimate meals slip through if other allowed alone

trigger_condition: Portion default medium when radio never rendered
guard_snippet: API default medium on omit portion field
potential_consequence: Client omit sends null breaks rollup

guard_snippet: Freeze TZ per log or document server TZ anchor

trigger_condition: Fewer than three eligible recipes total
guard_snippet: Show partial list plus browse CTA
potential_consequence: Empty module when one recipe matches

trigger_condition: Allergy filter removes every gap-matched recipe
guard_snippet: Fallback copy and link to all safe recipes
potential_consequence: User sees no ideas despite catalog

guard_snippet: Inline validation pattern on optional macro inputs
potential_consequence: Bad data breaks sorting or displays NaN

guard_snippet: Content QA rule or server warn on seed import

trigger_condition: Child birthday crosses nutrition row mid-onboarding
guard_snippet: Recompute row on profile save and invalidate day cache
potential_consequence: Wrong targets for rest of day

trigger_condition: Screen reader on horizontal meal ideas
guard_snippet: Ensure list roving tabindex or vertical alternative
Define inclusive vs exclusive threshold for hint fire
potential_consequence: Hint flicker near boundary across refreshes
